description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Integrator must be aligned with Sky’s overall strategy regarding promoting adoption of USDS.
of a prospective or current Integrator’s alignment with Sky’s overall strategy
Operational GovOps in consultation with Ecosystem Actor Viridian Advisors. In the future
may make this determination themselves or consult with another actor to do so
. Sky Core may choose whether to maintain an Integrator’s Reward Code in its sole and absolute discretion.
